plan_metrics.plan_content:
Here's the complete plan for the custom theme system. **8 files total** (3 new, 5 modified):

---

## What will change

### New files
1. **`packages/shared/src/theme.ts`** — `ThemeId`, `ThemeColorDefinition` (background, foreground, accent, sidebar, editor, terminal, statusBar + supporting CSS tokens), `BuiltInTheme`, and all 3 built-in themes with concrete CSS color values
2. **`apps/web/src/components/ThemeProvider.tsx`** — Minimal provider wrapper, added to `__root.tsx`
3. **`apps/web/src/components/ThemeSelector.tsx`** — 3-column grid of theme cards, each showing a mini layout preview (sidebar strip, editor area, accent dot, status bar) and a check mark when selected

### Modified files
4. **`packages/shared/package.json`** — Add `"./theme"` subpath export (same pattern as `./model`, `./git`, etc.)
5. **`apps/web/src/hooks/useTheme.ts`** — Full replacement: stores `ThemeId`, injects all CSS variables via `document.documentElement.style.setProperty()`, migrates legacy `"light"`/`"dark"`/`"system"` localStorage values, keeps `resolvedTheme: "light" | "dark"` so `DiffPanel`, `ChatMarkdown`, `ChatView`, and `DiffWorkerPoolProvider` continue working unchanged
6. **`apps/web/src/main.tsx`** — Add `import "./hooks/useTheme"` before `ReactDOM.render` for early theme application (flash prevention)
7. **`apps/web/src/routes/__root.tsx`** — Wrap root with `<ThemeProvider>`
8. **`apps/web/src/routes/_chat.settings.tsx`** — Replace Appearance radio group with `<ThemeSelector />`

### Not modified
- `apps/web/src/index.css` — existing CSS variable definitions stay as pre-JS fallbacks; no build config changes; no new dependencies
